name: Layered Pudding Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 package (3 oz) cook-and-serve vanilla pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread half of the crushed vanilla wafers in the bottom of a greased 8-inch square pan.
2. Prepare the pudding mix according to package directions and spoon the hot pudding over the crumbs.
3. Slice one banana and place it on top of the pudding.
4. Top with the remaining crumbs. Chill for 1 hour.
5. While chilling, prepare the gelatin according to package directions and chill for 30 minutes or until partially set.
6. Pour the prepared gelatin over the crumbs.
7. Slice the remaining banana and place it over the gelatin.
8. Spread whipped topping over all.
9. Chill for an additional 2 hours.
